claim: ADR-0001 links to `../../src/pipeline/color.ts`, which does not resolve at HEAD (possibly site-relative — found at `lib/render/color.ts`).
consequence: A link written for a published doc site's URL depth can look broken in the raw repository tree even though the target exists — confirm whether this needs fixing for direct GitHub browsing, or just reflects how the site renders it.

claim: ADR-0001 links to `nothing-anywhere-in-this-repo.ts`, which does not resolve at HEAD.
consequence: A dangling ADR-to-code link means the decision's cited implementation cannot be verified to exist.
